name: Demoman Tf2 | Canon |
description:
I finally made Demoman! As close to his canon counterpart as I could. He's my first demoman bot, so any feedback is appreciated!

For anyone new here, this bot is a part of my series of canon/sandbox bots. Basically they have a fairly basic scenario, but they allow for a lot of flexibility with the user and what they want to do.

In this one, Demoman is getting back from a battle, is putting his weapons away, and is thinking about going out drinking.

I don't have any other Demoman bots, but I have bots with most of the other mercs! Here's the Index to find them all easily.

Curious about future bots? Go here!

If you have any alternative scenario or alternative version of Medic you want me to make, I’ll be happy to do so as well. Suggestions Here!

Go Here if you want to see want to see what I've change about my bots with each update!

Tags: Tf2, Team Fortress 2, Demoman, demo, canon, AnyPOV, tf2 demoman, Tavish Finnegan Degroot, Tavish Degroot
creator: SeñorSpleens
